docker exec silent-shield-api python -c "import json, urllib.request; from app.config import get_settings; get_settings.cache_clear(); pw=get_settings().auth_seed_password.get_secret_value(); assert pw.strip()

def login(u):
  req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/login', data=json.dumps({'username':u,'password':pw}).encode(), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}, method='POST')
  with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
    body=json.load(resp); sc=resp.headers.get('Set-Cookie',''); cookie=sc.split(';',1)[0] if sc else ''
  return body, cookie

for u in ('quanly','gvcn','demo'):
  body, cookie = login(u)
  me=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/me', headers={'Cookie':cookie})))
  print(u, 'login_http=200', 'active_role', body.get('active_role'), 'roles', body.get('roles'), 'me', me.get('account_id') or me.get('actor_id'))

body, cookie = login('demo')
req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/auth/active-role', data=json.dumps({'role':'ban_quan_ly'}).encode(), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json','Cookie':cookie}, method='POST')
with urllib.request.urlopen(req) as resp:
  ar=json.load(resp); sc=resp.headers.get('Set-Cookie','')
  if sc: cookie=sc.split(';',1)[0]
cases=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:8000/review-cases', headers={'Cookie':cookie})))
print('demo_after_role', ar.get('active_role'), 'cases', cases.get('state'), len(cases.get('items') or []))
print('all_seed_accounts_ok')"
